title: Woah
wikitext:
[]: Woah. Post by Caiden » Sat Aug 30, 2008 2:48 pm I just had a epiphany. What if Shinji and Rei did it. He would of been having sex with a clone of his mom. GROSS!

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Aug 30, 2008 2:55 pm Get ready for a locking.

[]: Re: Woah. Post by zimlord » Sat Aug 30, 2008 3:03 pm Caiden wrote: I just had a epiphany. What if Shinji and Rei did it. He would of been having sex with a clone of his mom. GROSS!

[]: Post by Formless One » Sat Aug 30, 2008 3:17 pm Whooooooooo boy, has someone been out of the loop! This is an old hat argument against Rei/Shinji shipping. Been done over and over and over and... Ad Infinitum. Its something everyone relizes in time. Except the most neurotic shippers, of course. Those people are about as subtle as a brick in the naysayer dept.. But everyone knows that. I never thought this would get its very own thread, though!

[]: Post by chee » Sat Aug 30, 2008 4:02 pm slowpoke.jpg

[]: Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Aug 30, 2008 4:43 pm Someone needs to post that scene from EoE. It's as close as Shinji's gonna get to fucking his mom. I believe SSD has it uploaded somewhere. This thread's gonna get locked so fast.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Aug 30, 2008 4:49 pm Of course in a more real-world setting the reaction would be much like "An imouto/onii-chan half-related by blood, whom I've not been brought up with? Why hello there, genetic sexual attraction!"

[]: Re: Woah. Post by NAveryW » Sat Aug 30, 2008 6:04 pm Caiden wrote: I just had a n epiphany. What if Shinji and Rei did it ? He would have been having sex with a clone of his mom. GROSS!

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 30, 2008 6:11 pm Yep, one little red dot sitting atop another little red dot is HAWT. (Shinji hasn't reembodied yet at that point, he is once his head in on Rei's lap/the scene is in color instead of shades of red/orange.)

[]: Post by Formless One » Sat Aug 30, 2008 6:33 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Yep, one little red dot sitting atop another little red dot is HAWT. (Shinji hasn't reembodied yet at that point, he is once his head in on Rei's lap/the scene is in color instead of shades of red/orange.)

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Aug 30, 2008 7:26 pm He got the same treatment from Asuka. He is infinitely luckier in quantum form than in the real world.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 30, 2008 9:39 pm Nerds. Also, Formless One: The fact that coloring of that scene is in shades of red and orange/yellow instead of in regular color is a visual example of Shinji still being LCL.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 30, 2008 11:23 pm Iron Rooster wrote: Someone needs to post that scene from EoE. It's as close as Shinji's gonna get to fucking his mom.
